guide.title: Guide
guide.takePhoto: Take a Photo of Your Food
guide.takePhotoDesc: Tap the Camera icon in the bottom right of the app home screen then snap a photo.
guide.scanBarcodesDesc: To get started tap the Camera icon in the home screen then snap a photo of the bar code on the package.
guide.speechRecognitionDesc: Tap the Microphone icon in the home screen to start then again when you are done speaking.
guide.textModeDesc: Tap the Keyboard icon in the home screen to start adding things you ate via text input.
guide.editingDetailsDesc: You can edit the quantity or measurements of items you have added by tapping the relevant option.
guide.trackingCaloriesDesc: Tap the Track calories button when you are done to save the entries.

liveActivity.title: Live Activities
liveActivity.description: Track your calories in real-time right from your Lock Screen and Dynamic Island
liveActivity.iosOnlyDesc: Live Activities are only available on iOS devices.
liveActivity.unavailableDesc: Please enable Live Activities in iOS Settings > Caloric > Live Activities, and make sure you're running iOS 16.2 or later.
liveActivity.subtitle: Track your calories in real-time right from your Lock Screen and Dynamic Island.
